languages.text: "Конечно! Нам всего лишь стоит воздействовать на завал, вызвав чрезвычайно быстрое высвобождение большого количества энергии в ограниченном объеме. Иными словами — взорвать его к чертям!" {n}Эоганн азартно улыбается.{/n} "Я рекомендую использовать мельта-заряды — насколько помню, снаружи должен был быть контейнер, где могли остаться запасы".

"But of course! We simply need to trigger a rapid release of a vast amount of energy in a confined space. To put it plainly, we blow it to the warp!" {n}Eogunn grins with sudden enthusiasm.{/n} "I recommend melta charges. If memory serves, there should be a crate outside; it may still hold a few."
languages.original_text: "Конечно! Нам всего лишь стоит воздействовать на завал, вызвав чрезвычайно быстрое высвобождение большого количества энергии в ограниченном объеме. Иными словами — взорвать его к чертям!" {n}Эоганн азартно улыбается.{/n} "Я рекомендую использовать мельта-заряды — насколько помню, снаружи должен был быть контейнер, где могли остаться запасы".

traits.locale_text: "But of course! We simply need to trigger a rapid release of a vast amount of energy in a confined space. To put it plainly, we blow it to the warp!" {n}Eogunn grins with sudden enthusiasm.{/n} "I recommend melta charges. If memory serves, there should be a crate outside, it may still hold a few."

"But of course! We simply need to trigger a rapid release of a vast amount of energy in a confined space. To put it plainly, we blow it to the warp!" {n}Eogunn grins with sudden enthusiasm.{/n} "I recommend melta charges. If memory serves, there should be a crate outside, it may still hold a few."

"But of course! We simply need to trigger a rapid release of a vast amount of energy in a confined space. To put it plainly, we blow it to the warp!" {n}Eogunn grins with sudden enthusiasm.{/n} "I recommend melta charges. If memory serves, there should be a crate outside; it may still hold a few."

"But of course! We simply need to trigger a rapid release of a vast amount of energy in a confined space. To put it plainly, we blow it to the warp!" {n}Eogunn grins with sudden enthusiasm.{/n} "I recommend melta charges. If memory serves, there should be a crate outside; it may still hold a few."

languages.text: "Aber natürlich! Wir müssen nur auf engstem Raum eine gewaltige Menge Energie freisetzen. Oder anders gesagt: Wir sprengen alles in die Luft. {n}Eogunn grinst mit plötzlicher Begeisterung.{/n} "Ich empfehle Melterladungen. Wenn mich mein Gedächtnis nicht trügt, müsste da draußen eine Kiste stehen. Da könnten noch welche drin sein."
languages.original_text: "But of course! We simply need to trigger a rapid release of a vast amount of energy in a confined space. To put it plainly, we blow it to the warp!" {n}Eogunn grins with sudden enthusiasm.{/n} "I recommend melta charges. If memory serves, there should be a crate outside; it may still hold a few."

traits.locale_text: "Aber natürlich! Wir müssen nur auf engstem Raum eine gewaltige Menge Energie freisetzen. Oder anders gesagt: Wir sprengen alles in die Luft. {n}Eogunn grinst mit plötzlicher Begeisterung.{/n} "Ich empfehle Melterladungen. Wenn mich mein Gedächtnis nicht trügt, müsste da draußen eine Kiste stehen. Da könnten noch welche drin sein."

languages.text: « Bien sûr ! Il suffirait de déclencher un déferlement rapide d'une très grande quantité d'énergie dans un espace confiné. Autrement dit... faire tout exploser ! {n}Eogunn affiche un large sourire et continue d'un ton enthousiaste.{/n} Je recommande d'utiliser des charges à fusion. Si je me souviens bien, il y a une caisse à l'extérieur. Avec un peu de chance, elle en contient encore quelques-unes. »
languages.original_text: "But of course! We simply need to trigger a rapid release of a vast amount of energy in a confined space. To put it plainly, we blow it to the warp!" {n}Eogunn grins with sudden enthusiasm.{/n} "I recommend melta charges. If memory serves, there should be a crate outside; it may still hold a few."

traits.locale_text: « Bien sûr ! Il suffirait de déclencher un déferlement rapide d'une très grande quantité d'énergie dans un espace confiné. Autrement dit... faire tout exploser ! {n}Eogunn affiche un large sourire et continue d'un ton enthousiaste.{/n} Je recommande d'utiliser des charges à fusion. Si je me souviens bien, il y a une caisse à l'extérieur. Avec un peu de chance, elle en contient encore quelques-unes. »

languages.text: “当然有了！只需要在封闭空间里释放一股巨大的能量。说白了，就是把它炸开！”{n}伊奥贡咧嘴一笑，突然来了精神。{/n}“我推荐用热熔炸弹。要是没记错，外面应该还有一箱，里头或许还装着几个。”
languages.original_text: "But of course! We simply need to trigger a rapid release of a vast amount of energy in a confined space. To put it plainly, we blow it to the warp!" {n}Eogunn grins with sudden enthusiasm.{/n} "I recommend melta charges. If memory serves, there should be a crate outside; it may still hold a few."

traits.locale_text: “当然有了！只需要在封闭空间里释放一股巨大的能量。说白了，就是把它炸开！”{n}伊奥贡咧嘴一笑，突然来了精神。{/n}“我推荐用热熔炸弹。要是没记错，外面应该还有一箱，里头或许还装着几个。”

languages.text: «¡Por supuesto! Solo tenemos que provocar la liberación de gran cantidad de energía en un espacio cerrado. En resumen, ¡volar la obstrucción en pedazos!». {n}Eogunn sonríe con entusiasmo.{/n} «Recomiendo las cargas de fusión. Si mal no recuerdo, afuera hay una caja. Dentro deberían quedar unas pocas».
languages.original_text: "But of course! We simply need to trigger a rapid release of a vast amount of energy in a confined space. To put it plainly, we blow it to the warp!" {n}Eogunn grins with sudden enthusiasm.{/n} "I recommend melta charges. If memory serves, there should be a crate outside; it may still hold a few."

traits.locale_text: «¡Por supuesto! Solo tenemos que provocar la liberación de gran cantidad de energía en un espacio cerrado. En resumen, ¡volar la obstrucción en pedazos!». {n}Eogunn sonríe con entusiasmo.{/n} «Recomiendo las cargas de fusión. Si mal no recuerdo, afuera hay una caja. Dentro deberían quedar unas pocas».

languages.text: 「だが、もちろんだ！限られた空間で膨大なエネルギーを一気に放出させればいい。簡潔に言えば、〈歪み〉へ吹き飛ばすのだ！」{n}エオガンは突然の熱意ににやりと笑う。{/n}「メルタ・チャージを勧める。記憶が確かなら、外に木箱があるはずだ――まだ数発残っているかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: "But of course! We simply need to trigger a rapid release of a vast amount of energy in a confined space. To put it plainly, we blow it to the warp!" {n}Eogunn grins with sudden enthusiasm.{/n} "I recommend melta charges. If memory serves, there should be a crate outside; it may still hold a few."

traits.locale_text: 「だが、もちろんだ！限られた空間で膨大なエネルギーを一気に放出させればいい。簡潔に言えば、〈歪み〉へ吹き飛ばすのだ！」{n}エオガンは突然の熱意ににやりと笑う。{/n}「メルタ・チャージを勧める。記憶が確かなら、外に木箱があるはずだ――まだ数発残っているかもしれない。」

languages.text: "Elbette! Sadece kapalı bir alanda muazzam miktarda enerjinin hızla salınımını tetiklememiz gerekiyor. Öteboyuta yollayacağız yani!" {n}Eogunn, anlık bir coşkuyla sırıtıyor.{/n} "Melta bombalarını tavsiye ederim. Hafızam beni yanıltmıyorsa dışarıda bir sandık olacaktı. İçinde hâlâ birkaç tane olabilir."
languages.original_text: "But of course! We simply need to trigger a rapid release of a vast amount of energy in a confined space. To put it plainly, we blow it to the warp!" {n}Eogunn grins with sudden enthusiasm.{/n} "I recommend melta charges. If memory serves, there should be a crate outside; it may still hold a few."
